pages.title: Rogue
pages.text: Combat primary. Fifteen items. Two shadow armor sets, the grave-sentinel set, two paired weapons, and the rogue spell book.

pages.title: Shadow armor
pages.text: $(bold)Rogue Armor.$(/) Phantom-membrane cowl, sculk-vein dye.$(br2)$(bold)Assassin Armor.$(/) Sculk-darkened hood, netherite-scrap edged coat.$(br2)Phantom membrane is the signature material. Head, chest, legs, feet for each set.

pages.title: Grave-sentinel set
pages.text: $(bold)Grave-Sentinel Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots.$(/) Netherite, soul soil, bone block, wither rose.$(br2)Paired weapons:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Cursed Blade$(/) — wither-rose tip, wither-skull pommel.$(li)$(bold)Crimson Reaper$(/) — redstone-block scythe, netherite head.

pages.title: Notes
pages.text: $(bold)Rogue Spell Book.$(/) Ink and sculk bound around an enchanted book.$(br2)Matching trader: the Rogue.
